# QRA Strategies LLC

> Medical device regulatory consulting and Quality Management System (QMS) buildout for MedTech startups.

QRA Strategies LLC is a specialized regulatory consulting firm that partners with MedTech startups and emerging medical device companies to build audit-ready Quality Management Systems and navigate FDA, CE Mark, ISO 13485, and MDSAP compliance requirements.

## Services

- **QMS Buildout**: Design and implementation of ISO 13485-compliant Quality Management Systems proportionate to company stage
- **FDA Regulatory Strategy**: 510(k) submissions, De Novo applications, PMA strategy, and pre-submission meetings
- **CE Mark / MDR Compliance**: EU Medical Device Regulation (MDR 2017/745) technical documentation and conformity assessment
- **MDSAP Certification**: Multi-jurisdictional regulatory compliance for US, Canada, Brazil, Australia, and Japan
- **Regulatory Due Diligence**: Pre-investment and pre-acquisition regulatory risk assessments
- **Audit Readiness**: Gap analysis, CAPA management, and audit preparation
